summary: Reject template stack ref environment overrides
description: Prove the template bootstrap treats .go/project.json as the only stack-ref source and rejects legacy GO_STACK_REF overrides.
acceptance: Stack smoke tests prove GO_STACK_REF cannot override a copied template project contract.

evidence.summary: TDD RED proved GO_STACK_REF could replace .go/project.json and still return success. GREEN rejects the override; all bootstrap regressions pass. Verification: scripts/check-linux.sh 74 tests and pairing green; scripts/check-pilots.sh distribution and pilots green.
